audit_items.proof_trace: Post-Fulu implementations do not have divergent code paths. Both block production (beacon_chain.rs:5254) and verification (block_verification.rs:991) call state.get_beacon_proposer_index(), which for post-Fulu ALWAYS reads from proposer_lookahead state field (L1144-1153). There is no 'recompute from seed' fallback for current-epoch proposers in Fulu—the pre-Fulu path (L1155-1159) is unreachable when proposer_lookahead exists. The cached value IS the authoritative value; no divergence can occur.
